title: Three Bids Policy
content: Purchases over 10,000 EUR require three competitive quotes before award.

title: Laboratory Instruments Group
content: Microscopes, centrifuges and spectrometers map to material group MG-LAB-001.

title: UNSPSC 41100000
content: Laboratory and scientific equipment commodity family 41100000.

title: Zeiss Instruments
content: Zeiss supplies optical and laboratory instruments and is preferred for microscopy.

title: 2025 Lab Refresh
content: Prior lab refresh sourced 8 microscopes and 3 centrifuges at High priority with a 10 week lead time.

title: Lab Consumables and PPE Group
content: Centrifuge tubes, pipette tips, cryogenic vials, lab coats, gloves and other single-use disposables and personal protective equipment map to material group MG-LAB-002.

title: UNSPSC 42130000
content: Medical and laboratory consumables and supplies commodity family 42130000 covers disposable tubes, tips, vials, and protective clothing.

title: Office Furniture and Supplies Group
content: Desks, chairs, filing cabinets, stationery and general office supplies map to material group MG-OFF-001.

title: UNSPSC 44100000
content: Office machines, accessories and their supplies commodity family 44100000 covers printers, shredders and paper products.

title: IT Hardware Group
content: Laptops, desktops, monitors, servers and networking equipment map to material group MG-IT-001.

title: UNSPSC 43210000
content: Computer equipment and accessories commodity family 43210000 covers laptops, desktops, monitors and peripherals.

title: Fisher Scientific
content: Fisher Scientific supplies laboratory consumables, reagents, tubes, pipette tips and personal protective equipment and is preferred for lab disposables.

title: Dell Technologies
content: Dell Technologies supplies laptops, desktops, monitors and servers and is preferred for IT hardware procurement.

title: PPE Safety Standard
content: Personal protective equipment such as lab coats and gloves must meet EN safety standards and be sourced from approved suppliers.

title: 2025 Consumables Restock
content: Prior quarterly restock sourced centrifuge tubes, pipette tips and cryogenic vials from Fisher Scientific at Medium priority with a 3 week lead time.
